name: Sm Stir Fry Veg Pockets
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Fresh Vegetables for Stir Fry (a combination of any of the following):
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by combining all ingredients in a measuring cup and set aside.
2. Heat a large skillet or wok on medium high.
3. Add oil to the hot pan.
4. When the oil is hot, add vegetables and cook, stirring until the vegetables are tender but still crisp. Do not overcook.
5. Add the sauce and cook, stirring constantly until thick.
6. Trim the sides of the pita bread and gently separate each into 2 layers.
7. Brush the outside of each half with oil if desired.
8. Place 4 halves on the oiled side down.
9. Spoon vegetables over each pocket.
10. Top with remaining bread.
11. Close the lid and cook for 3-5 minutes, or until heated through and sealed.
